title: The Arbiter of Steel
description: The Arbiter challenges the party leader to single combat. Direct. Honest. Wants a real fight and will be disappointed by anything less.

lines.speaker: Arbiter
lines.text: Spar with me first. Before the real thing. For calibration.

lines.speaker: Arbiter
lines.text: I challenge one of you. Whoever leads. The others stay back. I'll know if they don't.

lines.speaker: Arbiter
lines.text: Come at me with everything. I'll know if you're holding back. And I'll be disappointed.
